event_info: Jaiswal welcomes Starc with a massive six over square leg; short and in the slot; Jaiswal was hanging back; picks it and swings it across the line over backward square leg
back of a length delivery outside off; Jaiswal taps it to the off side

ball_event: out Caught&Bowled!! Starc has the last laugh
event_info: his maiden wicket this season; it was a poor delivery though; a full-toss on middle; Jaiswal was surprised by the delivery and looks to swing it across the line; the ball balloons up off the top half of the bat and Starc settles under it comfortably; they checked whether it was above the waist; but it's a fair delivery and Jaiswal has to walk back. Yashasvi Jaiswal c and b Mitchell Starc 6(3) [6s-1]
full and swinging in from outside off; Jurel gets forward and pushes it towards mid on
excellent delivery; in the channel just outside off and this one moves away a bit; Jurel pokes at it and misses
too full and swinging in; Jurel pushes it to mid-off for a quick single; good first over from Starc
angling in from outside off; Jurel gets forward and defends it towards covers
Jurel is beaten comprehensively; short on middle and shaping away; Jurel walks down the track and is completely beaten by the swing; he's looking clueless
back of a length and outside off; Jurel taps it to gully; all eyes on Sooryavanshi now
take that; that the only way he knows to play; pitched up and in the slot; Sooryavanshi stands tall and drills it all along the ground to long-off; no soul moved

good comeback from Jamieson; low dipping full-toss; Sooryavanshi was hanging back in the crease and looks to dig it out; the ball takes the under-edge and deflects off the back pad onto the stumps. The aggressive openers are back in the hut. Vaibhav Sooryavanshi b Kyle Jamieson 4(2) [4s-1]
good length delivery outside off and shaping away; Parag leaves it alone
hint of width outside off stump; Jurel latches onto it in a flash; gets into a good position and square drives it past the fielder square of the wicket; that raced away
full outside off and angling across; Jurel slices it to deep backward point
back of a length delivery outside off and angling across; Parag slashes hard at it and misses
banged in short just outside off; Parag goes for the pull and misses it; it got big on him and he was late into the shot
he's just manages to dig it out; yorker; tailing in late; Parag was hanging back in the crease and just manages to get some bat on it
he's off the mark; back of a length and outside off; Parag picks it and swings it across the line to deep mid-wicket; he picked the length early and dispatches it with ease
back of a length and angling into the pads; Jurel works it away to backward square leg
full and outside off; Parag reaches out and slices it to deep backward point; he was playing away from his body
nicely timed; full and tailing into the pads; Jurel just uses the pace of the ball and flicks it off his legs to deep square leg; Starc in the deep gave up as it was timed beautifully
pitched up and in the slot; Jurel plays a full blooded drive to short cover; a slight fumble and they get a single
well bowled; good length delivery just outside off and shaping away; Parag goes for an expansive drive; but was beaten by the late away swing
on a length outside off; Parag knocks it to point for a quick single
tossed up and outside off; Parag drives it to long-off
trifle short and outside off; Jurel ws hanging back in the crease; gets on top of the ball and cuts it square of the wicket on the off side; poor delivery
slowed it down a bit; flighted on middle; Jurel pushes it down to mid-on
he attempts the reverse sweep and misses it; quicker delivery outside off; Parag couldn't connect it

another quicker delivery on middle; it skidded a bit; Parag once again attempts the reverse sweep and is hit flush on the pads; no bat involved and the ball tracking shows it was missing leg; DC lose a review
quicker outside off; Parag drives it down to long-off
he's connected this one beautifully; full and in the slot; Parag plays the pick-up shot to perfection and sends it into the stands over deep mid-wicket
now he's gone short; short and wide outside off; Parag throws his bat at it and the ball flies off the outside edge to third man
this is an awesome shot and he's held the pose; full and on middle; Parag makes room; gets under the ball nicely and lofts it inside out over deep extra cover; he connected it with ease
slower delivery; Parag works it to mid-on for a quick single
back of a length and angling in; Jurel works it in the gap at square leg; they run well for the second
angling in from outside off; Jurel pushes it to mid-on; end of the powerplay
tossed up and outside off; Jurel stands tall and punches it to long-on
quicker and drifting on the pads; Parag works it to mid-wicket
slower and shorter; Jurel was beaten in the flight; but adjusts it at the last minute and guides it past the fielder to third man; the partnership between Dhruv Jurel and Riyan Parag is now 50
flatter delivery outside off; Jurel cuts it to point excellent stop by Rana
tossed up delivery on middle; Jurel knocks it down to mid-wicket
flatter and on the pads; Parag works it to mid-wicket
full and turning in; Parag drives it down to long-on
tossed up on off; Jurel pushes it to mid-on; Yadav dives to his right; but can't stop it
excellent stop by Rizvi in the deep; flatter and quicker on middle; Parag goes back and whips it off his legs to deep mid-wicket
on the pads again; Parag flicks it to deep mid-wicket
flatter on middle; Jurel punches it down to long-on
nicely tossed up outside off; Parag gets forward and pushes it in the gap at short cover
nice clean hit; tossed up delivery outside off; Parag picks it and lofts it through the line over long-on; it was in the slot and he smashed it
six more; bit quicker on off; Parag this time swings it across the line to deep mid-wicket; he's going after Axar
flatter and outside off; Parag pushes it down to long-off
sliding in; Jurel works it in the gap at mid-wicket; they wanted the second; but Parag slipped
flatter and quicker; Parag defends it to the off side
pushed through again; Parag taps it towards the off side
full and on middle; Jurel flicks it away to mid-wicket
tossed up and on middle; Parag pushes it to point
quicker on middle; Jurel pushes it back to the bowler
Yadav gets one to slide through; Jurel was rooted to the crease; the ball goes off the inside half of the bat to backward square leg
tossed up on middle; Parag drives it down to long-on
fired in full on middle; Jurel makes room and drives it down to long-off
back of a length and angling across; Parag slaps it hard; but straight to the fielder at covers
back of a length and wide outside off stump; wide signalled
full and pushed across; Parag reaches out for it and drives it in the air to deep extra cover; he hit it wide of the fielder
50 up for the skipper; his 1st this season; full and on middle; Parag drives it down to long-off; animated celebrations from him
short and on off; Jurel stands tall and pulls it away to deep mid-wicket
poor delivery; juicy full-toss; Parag is seeing the ball like a football at the moment; picks it and smashes it to deep extra cover fence
this is a strange shot; how did he do that; it was short and outside off; Parag makes room and swats it to long-off; nice use of the wrists and it raced away; absolutely slapped that!
tossed up delivery on middle and leg; Jurel moves across to the leg side and drives it to long-off
flatter and quicker; Parag works it with soft hands to short mid-wicket
Jurel into the act now; fuller and quicker; Jurel gets under the ball nicely and clubs it straight down the ground; the partnership between Dhruv Jurel and Riyan Parag is now 100

ball_event: out Caught by Tristan Stubbs!! Axar has struck with a poor ball
event_info: short and outside off; it was there to be hit; Jurel eyes lit up as he went deep into the crease; but hits it high in the air towards long-on; where Stubbs takes a sharp catch. Dhruv Jurel c Tristan Stubbs b Axar Patel 42(30) [4s-4 6s-1]
flatter delivery; Jadeja works it to mid-wicket to get off the mark
bowled through slower; Parag was beaten in the flight and lofts it in the air square of the wicket; it landed safely though
speared in full on off; Parag drills it down to long-on
full and tailing in; Jadeja drives it down to long-on; good bowling from Natty; giving nothing away

huge appeal for an LBW turned down; excellent yorker on middle and leg; Parag was late to get his bat down; initially it looked like he was trapped in front; may be it was pitched outside leg stump; Axar thinks to go for the review; but decides against it in the end
good length delivery outside off; Jadeja pushes it towards covers
short outside off stump; Jadeja walks across and slaps it to cover for a couple

a terrible mix-up and Jadeja was almost run out; good length outside off; Jadeja taps it towards point and sets off for the single; Parag was watching the ball and Jadeja was almost half way down the track; the fielder has a shy at the striker's end and misses it; a direct hit would have been curtains for Jaddu
1 run; tossed up on the leg-stump line; Parag shapes for the slog-sweep and misses; off the pad and rolls to the on-side
flighted delivery on middle and leg; nudged into the gap past square leg - played with soft hands and he's back for the second
flighted delivery outside off - RJ prods half-forward as he defended to the off-side

a run-out shout; but KL had to turn around as he broke the stumps and that gave Riyan Parag enough time to complete the single - excellent fielding from Ashutosh as he intercepted the cut to the left of backward point
thumped; flighted delivery on middle and leg; Riyan clears his left leg and hammers it back over the bowler's head; one bounce and over the ropes
very full and at the stumps; Riyan clears his left leg and squeezes it out to long-on
low full toss around off; Parag drives down the ground and Starc gets across from long-off; keeps it to a brace
very full delivery at the stumps; Paraj clears his front leg and digs it wide of long-on; two more
bouncer but it is too short and too high; Parag thought about ramping it over short third but let it go; called wide for height
another full toss and Parag whips it with a strong bottom hand to long-on; straight to Stubbs
hammered; fuller length delivery on off; RJ leans forward; presents the full face of the bat and lifts it back over the bowler's head; sails over the ropes
back of a length and at the stumps - RJ swivels across and pulls it through mid-wicket for a single
17 off the over; another low full-toss on off; Parag leans forward and drills it back over the bowler's head; bounces away to the ropes
slower short ball outside off - chopped to the left of backward point for a single
nicely played; fuller length delivery on the pads; flicked into the gap behind square on the on-side; beats the man in the ring and runs away to the ropes for a boundary
cheeky and four; the slower bouncer from Jamieson; banged into the pitch and would have gone over Parag's head - he waits; leaps and then runs it over the keeper's head; bounces away to the ropes
that's too easy for Parag; full-toss on the pads and it's whipped away backward of square on the on-side for a boundary
fuller length delivery outside off - driven into the gap wide of cover for a single
low full-toss outside off; driven to the right of mid-off - Stubbs throws himself to his right and makes the stop
cheeky and four; short of a good length and just outside off - RJ plays close to his body and then cuts it late; to the right of short third; the fielder dives and lets the ball go under him
Starc attempts the inswinging yorker; but he pushes it down leg and is called as a wide

ball_event: out Caught by Ashutosh Sharma!! That's a dolly to backward point and Starc has his second wicket - change of pace from Starc
event_info: slower short ball outside off and RJ has no pace to play the dab over the infield; hits it straight to Ashutosh - an useful cameo from RJ comes to an end. Ravindra Jadeja c Ashutosh Sharma b Mitchell Starc 20(14) [4s-1 6s-1]
fuller length delivery on the pads; whipped down to long-on for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Axar Patel!! Starc is making a difference here for the Capitals - shortened the length and went hard into the pitch
event_info: Parag was shaping for the lofted cover-drive; but the ball might've held up a fraction on the pitch; hit high on the bat and spooned a skier to the DC captain at mid-off. Riyan Parag c Axar Patel b Mitchell Starc 90(50) [4s-8 6s-5]
on a good length and just outside off - dabbed with an open face to backward point
a slingy full-toss down leg; past Dubey's flick and has been wided

creamed; too full and too wide from Starc; a half-volley and it's drilled into the gap wide of cover; runs away across the fast outfield. The extra ball ruins what would have been a fine over from Starc
flighted delivery on middle and leg; punched down to long-on for a single
the wwrong 'un; spins back and cramps Dubey for room - stabbed to the off-side for a single
lovely; tad too full and wide of off; it's the wrong 'un; but this is right in Ferreira's slot - he leans across; plays with a slightly open face and then goes inside out over cover for a maximum
smashed; tad too full once again from Kuldeep - it's once again in the slot and Ferreira doesn't miss out; swings through the line and clears long-off for a maximum
flighted delivery on middle; pulled back at the bowler

20 off the over; Kuldeep's last over was kept for Ferreira; but the batter has the last laugh - flighted delivery on middle and leg; it's once again in the arc and the right-hander shovels it into the stands at deep mid-wicket
fuller length delivery at the stumps; clipped wide of mid-wicket for a single
the slower bouncer; but it loops over Ferreira's head; called as a wide
the wide yorker; full and wide of off; made Ferreira reach out on the drive and beats him on the outside edge
yorker length delivery on off; squeezed to the left of cover for a single
yorker length delivery on the pads; past Dubey's flick and ricochets off the pad to the off-side

nicely played; full and wide of off; almost a wide full-toss and it's scythed over backward point - the fielder in the deep runs to his right; dives and goes one-handed; but the ball bounces short of him
classy; fuller length delivery outside off - Ferreira gets under it and then carves it high over cover - sails over the ropes; this is a stunning finish from the South African
the wide yorker; but it's well wide of the tramlines; called by the umpire

ball_event: out Caught by Ashutosh Sharma!! An ugly slog from Dubey and he's holed out to cover -was a low full-toss and he went too hard on the slog
event_info: the ball catches the lower half of the bat and went straight up - Ashutosh settles under and completes a fine catch. Shubham Dubey c Ashutosh Sharma b Natarajan 6(6) [4s-1]
fuller length delivery at the stumps; clipped wide of mid-wicket for a single
clubbed; Ferreira is playing a match-winning camoe here; was a slower short ball outside off and it's swatted away past square leg; the fielder in the deep is very square and has no chance

smashed; a low full-toss and Ferreira has hammered it over long-off's head - nothing wrong with the ball by Natarajan; might've missed the length by a yard; hit the bottom of Ferreira's bat and he still has enough power to clear the man in the deep
the slower short ball; was bowled into the pitch and Ferreira leaves it on height. Not called as a wide and they don't review either

a sitter and Axar has dropped it; to make matters worse; he's palmed it over the ropes - a low full-toss and Ferreira didn't get the elevation on the lofted drive; hit hard and flat; right down long-off's throat. Axar went reverse cupped; but the ball hit his forearm and bounced over the ropes
on a good length and just outside off - Nissanka plays with an open face and runs it to backward point
short of a good length and just outside off - Nissanka hops across and stabs it to the off-side; wanted a single and is sent back
on a good length and just outside off - Nissanka waits on it and defends it back at the bowler
Archer looks to follow Nissanka as he backed away; but he slides it down leg and has been wided
nicely played; fuller length delivery at the stumps - Nissanka leans forward and then drives it over mid-on; almost went all the way; bouncing in front of the ropes
lovely; on a good length and angling into the pads; Nissanka gets inside the line; uses Archer's pace and then whips it over long leg for a maximum
banged in short and just outside off - Nissanka swivels across and then drops his gloves on the pull; through to the keeper
nicely played; short of a length and at the hips; KL gets inside the line; uses Burger's pace and flicks it behind square on the on-side; runs away to the ropes in a hurry
short of a good length and just outside off - KL gets behind the line as he defended
short of a good length and angling across the right-hander - KL went hard on the cut and the under-edge bounces past the off-stump
nicely bowled; short of a good length and shaping across the right-hander - KL makes a late call to play and almost edged it through to the keeper
on a good length and just outside off - KL stays on the back-foot as he drove it to mid-off
cracking shot; on a good length and angling across the right-hander - KL stands tall and then drives it up and over cover; one bounce and over the ropes

Pathum Nissanka has been clonked on the helmet and the ball runs away to the ropes - banged in short and he's rushed onto the pull; ricocheted of the shoulder; onto the helmet and rolls into the gap behind point. Replays show that the ball flicked the top-edge first and the umpire changes the call to runs
nicely played; short of a good length and just outside off - Nissanka waits on it; opens the face of the bat and then uses Archer's pace to run it behind point
on a good length and just outside off; pushed in front of mid-off and he's off for a quick single
short of a good length and just outside off - KL stays besides the ball and defends it to the off-side

cracking shot; fraction short and KL is all over it like a rash - transfers he weight onto the back-foot; swivels across and then plays a lovely pull over square leg. Didn't bother to keep it down and sends it sailing into the stands
that was close; short of a good length and angling back into the right-hander - KL swivels across onto the pull and misses; the ball whizzes past the off-stump
beautifully played; tad short and at the stumps - Nissanka stays on the front-foot; swivels across and then hammers the pull over deep backward square leg for a maximum
on a good length and angling across the right-hander; chopped in front of square on the off-side; needed a sliding effort in the deep to keep them down to a couple
fuller length delivery outside off; Nissanka leans half-forward into the drive to mid-off
fuller length delivery outside off - Nissanka stays besides the line and finds cover-point with the drive
clubbed; back of a length and just outside off - Nissanka picks the length early; swivels across and then dismisses the pull over mid-wicket; soars over the ropes for a maximum
short of a good length and just outside off - Nissanka chops an under-edge in front of backward point for a single
low full-toss down leg; Nissanka is early into the flick; the ball catches the leading edge and lobs behind square on the on-side - a slight fumbleby Bishnoi and he's back for the second
fuller length delivery on the pads; clipped into the gap past square leg and they're back for the second
slower ball on the pads; tucked through square leg for a couple of more runs
that's easy pickings for Nissanka - full-toss down leg and it's whipped behind square on the on-side; runs away to the ropes in a hurry
fuller length delivery on the pads; clipped straight to the fielder at mid-wicket
short of a good length and just outside off - hacked straight to the fielder at mid-wicket
fuller length delivery outside off; driven crisply and straight to the fielder at mid-off
on a good length and on off; pushed back at the bowler
crunched; too full and too wide from Brijesh - KL throws his bat on the drive and finds the gap wide of extra-cover for a boundary
Brijesh drags the length back as KL backed away; the right-hander inside halves the drive to mid-off
banged in short and at the stumps - Pathum Nissanka swivels across and doesn't get hold of the pull; muscles it over square leg and he's back for the second

beautifully played; back of a length and at the stumps - Nissanka picks the length early; swivels across and then thumps the pull over mid-wicket; one bounce and over the ropes; brings up the opener's maiden IPL fifty
starts with a flatter and quicker delivery; Rahul punches to long-on
uhh! 106ks skiddy delivery and Nissanka brings his bat down in time; stabs it off the inner half to square leg
106.2ks leg-lined delivery; Rahul clips it backward of square
106.5ks sliding across; Nissanka looks to pull and ends up chopping it onto the pad
109.1ks even quicker and drifting in; Nissanka nudges it through mid-wicket and settles with a single
he became predictable there. 107ks flatter delivery; Rahul hangs on the back foot; deep in the crease and smashes it straight over Bishnoi; one bounce and over the ropes
flighted but fraction short; Nissanka chops it square on the off-side
tossed up close to off; Rahul stays leg-side and drives it towards sweeper cover
touch square and on the shorter side; Nissanka cuts it behind square and picks up a couple
once more short of length and Nissanka is quick to pick the length; goes back and pulls it wide of deep mid-wicket. Jaiswal does well to get around and keep it to a brace
quicker and around off; Nissanka is rooted to the crease and squeezes it off the outer half to backward point
much needed boundary. This is a dragdown by Jadeja and Nissanka does not miss out; even though he fetches it from outside off; he middles the pull and beats long-on comfortably

shot! Bishnoi goes full and overpitches; the line is outside off and Rahul does not miss out - bread and butter for him; he plays the lofted drive over extra cover and almost sends it the distance - one bounce and over the ropes
shortens the length; Rahul is rushed on the cut and he chops it to cover
tight second. A dive saves Nissanka. Rahul tucks the googly towards square leg and calls for second. Nissanka had to hurry and in the end dives in to make his ground

that's high and long. Bishnoi fires it in; but the length is right in the slot; Rahul stays leg-side and gives himself the space to free his hands; lofts through the line and sends it sailing over long-on. 86 meters..
short and outside off; Rahul waits and cuts it square on the off-side. Deshpande gets around from sweeper and dives to save the boundary. Top effort to stop a couple of runs
Rahul takes Bishnoi apart.20 from the over. Once again the length was all wrong. Overcooks the flighted delivery and Rahul is not miss out; he thumps it down the ground and clears long-off with ease
darted full and outside off; Nissanka drills it to long-off and is content with a single
slower and short of length; Rahul checks his back foot punch and sends it to sweeper cover

ball_event: out Lbw!! Jadeja breaks the partnership! Much needed breakthrough for Rajasthan Royals. A fine knock from Nissanka comes to an end. Did he need to play that shot? He attempts the reverse sweep
event_info: misses a straight ball and is struck in-line with the stumps. Virender Sharma had no hesitation and had his finger up in a flash. Nissanka tries his luck with the review but costs his side one. Ball-tracking showed it to be crashing into off-stump. Pathum Nissanka lbw b Ravindra Jadeja 62(33) [4s-6 6s-3]
slower and hint of turn; Rana tucks it round the corner - square leg
short and outside off; Rahul cracks it square and the sweeper tidies up
91.8ks flatter and at the stumps; Rana nudges it through mid-wicket and retains strike
short and outside off; Rana attempts the cut and misses out. That was there to be put away..
138.2ks very full delivery; Rana drives in front of square and Bishnoi runs around; dives and keeps it to a couple
off-pace delivery; angled in and Rana pulls to deep mid-wicket
full pitcher at the stumps; Rahul drives down to long-on
142.3ks speared into the blockhole; Rana digs it out towards point

fifty for Rahul. He started slowly but has stepped on the gas since the end of the powerplay. The onus is on him to take it deep and close. Third fifty of the season and there's a hundred as well. Full delivery on off; Rahul drives sans timing down the ground and comes back for the second as Ferreira tidies up from long-on. He raises his bat and acknowledges the applause of his team
this is the match-up Delhi Capitals want Rana to win. He has to take down Jadeja. This is drifted across from round the wicket; Rana sits down and launches the slog sweep over deep mid-wicket
quicker and leg-lined; Rana nudges it through the vacant mid-wicket region

Archer moves to his left and watches it sail past him. Fraction short and outside off; Rahul shuffles across and flat-bats it down the ground. That was close to Archer but Rahul got enough to beat him
slower and short of length; Rahul waits and knocks it square on the off-side
tossed up around off; Rana sits down and misses the sweep. Struck high on the pad and the angle was taking it past off-stump; hence no appeal for LBW from Jadeja

massive over - 18 runs. They needed that after a couple of quiet overs. Jadeja went wide with the line; but overpitches and Rana pounces; he gets under the length and lofts it over extra cover; one bounce and over the ropes
low full toss on off; Rahul clears his front leg and clips it to deep square leg

uhhh! That was nicely done. Deshpande went short and into the wicket; Rana ramps and the idea was to go over short third; but ends up getting it over Jurel. He gets enough connect to clear the keeper and pick up the boundary
1 run; appeal for LBW. But this clearly pitched outside leg. Jurel and Deshpande have a chat and decide against the review. Full delivery around leg; Rana misses the flick and is struck on the pad

direct hit but Rahul is in. Fullish delivery around off; pushes it meekly to mid-off and is off in a flash. Jaiswal swoops down and fires an accurate throw at the non-striker's end. But Rahul was comfortably in and even picks up the extra run thanks to the deflection
very full and close to yorker length; Rahul digs the drive out to long-on

direct hit and Rana was gone. Full delivery on off; Rana pushes it firmly to mid-off and calls for a risky single. Jaiswal is the fielder once again and he does not find the target. Rana had given up..

lovely shot! Rana starts the over with a maximum. This is a full delivery; right in the slot outside off and Rana pumps it over extra cover. He got it off the middle and in the gap; the ball sails over the rope
this si smart batting. Rana shuffles across his stumps; waits for the ball to arrive and whips it backward of square. He used the pace of Burger there and picked up the boundary
moves around in the crease and Burger manages to nail the yorker; jammed towars long-on and Rana was a bit casual in crossing over. He's made to hurry and he gets in
now Rahul has a piece of Burger. The angle works against Burger; he lands it right in the arc and Rahul clears his front leg; gets his bottom hand into play and whips it in front of square
very full and close to yorker length; Rahul digs the drive out to extra cover
low full toss around off; Rahul toe-ends the drive to mid-off and sprints to the other end. Jaiswal does not hit the target

FOUR; that's beaten everyone. Rahul moves away and Deshpande follows him with a full delivery; it was in the slot and Rahul tried to loft through the line; misses and even a full length dive from Jurel is not enough to stop the ball
full pitcher around off; Rahul makes room and drills it on the bounce to long-off

ball_event: out Caught by Dhruv Jurel!! Excellent review from RR! Rana is not complaining as he walks off. So that suggests there was an edge. Wide yorker outside off
event_info: Rana shuffles across and bends down to reach it; gets it off the toe-end and Jurel takes a simple catch. The appeal was a confident one from Jurel and he convinced Jurel to review. The partnership is broken and the dangerous Rana is back in the hut. Nitish Rana c Dhruv Jurel b Tushar Deshpande 33(17) [4s-3 6s-2]
143.1ks low full toss on off; Stubbs drives it straight back and Deshpande does well to stop in his followthrough
141.7ks full toss on the pads; Stubbs flicks it to deep mid-wicket
speared into the blockhole; Rahul gets his front leg out of the way and jams it to long-on

have Bishnoi and Shanaka saved the boundary? No. Fullish delivery; Rahul loses his grip on the bat - the bottom hand comes off the bat handle and miscues the loft over extra cover. Bishnoi runs across from sweeper and parries the ball; but it rolls in and Shanaka touches the rope while picking up the ball

ball_event: out Caught by Donovan Ferreira!! That's the wicket Rajasthan Royals wanted. A well-set Rahul is on his way back. A fine knock but he would be disappointed. This was a pace on delivery
event_info: right in the slot but Archer's extra pace meant Rahul's bat turned in his hand; he mistimes the big shot to long-on and Ferreira laps it up safely. The Royals are hanging in there.. Rahul c Donovan Ferreira b Jofra Archer 75(40) [4s-6 6s-5]
bouncer to welcome the new batter; Ashutosh ducks and allows it to sail over. Called wide for height..
fullish delivery on off; Ashutosh is late on the push and squeezes it off the inner half to mid-wicket
146.9ks full and outside off; Stubbs reaches and drives towards extra cover
full delivery around off; Ashutosh pushes it to the left of Archer
that ruins the over for Rajasthan Royals. Archer strays onto the pads and Ashutosh flicks it in front of square; splits the two fielders - deep square leg and deep mid-wicket - perfectly
full toss on leg-stump; Stubbs clips it towards long-on
short and outside off; Ashutosh cracks it to sweeper cover and the fielder almost does not judge the overspin
sprays the full toss down leg; Stubbs gets nothing on it and umpire signals a wide
slower ball on middle; Stubbs eases it down to long-on
another attempted yorker sprayed down leg; Ashutosh stands his ground and watches it go past him
141ks back of a length delivery; Ashutosh opens the bat face and guides it behind square on the off-side; easy brace
that's nicely done. Ashutosh walks down; sits down and laps the full toss fine. Not quite off the middle but he got it fine for the ball to race away
slower ball outside off; Ashutosh walks down and across; chops it to sweeper cover and retains strike
attempted wide yorker but not kept within the marker; Ashutosh had moved away and had no chance of reaching that

nicely done! Ashutosh is moving around in the crease but Deshpande stays calm and nails the wide yorker; but Ashutosh opens the bat face and steers it past a diving short third. He used the pace on offer and collected the boundary
missed out there. Full toss outside off; Ashutosh premeditated the lap and hits it straight into the helmet. Right on the grill and the ball rolls back down the pitch
139.4ks full toss outside off; Ashutosh guides it straight to deep backward point
that's a gift from Deshpande and Stubbs accepts it happily. Just the ball he needed to get himself going. Nice; juicy full toss and Stubbs pumps it down the ground; clears long-on comfortably
sprays another one outside off; the idea is to keep it away from the arc but Deshpande does not keep it inside the guideline; Stubbs lets go and pockets the wide
and again.. Repeat of the previous delivery. Wayward delivery outside off; Stubbs leaves and collects the wide
low full toss on off; Stubbs toe-ends the drive down the ground and sticks to a single
141.2ks low full toss on the pads; Ashutosh flicks it to deep mid-wicket
full toss just below the waist; Ashutosh mistimes the heave over backward square; goes on the bounce to Shanaka
full and angling into the pads; Stubbs flicks it wide of deep mid-wicket and picks up an easy brace
nails the yorker and Stubbs can't do much about it; jams it back to Archer
very full delivery on leg; Stubbs digs it out to long-on and settles with a single
not quite short and Ashutosh mistimes the pull past Stubbs. Jaiswal gets around from mid-off and keeps it to a single

Archer is livid. He can't believe it. He's waving his arms around. Bishnoi came in for the catch and misjudged the trajection. Full and angled in; Stubbs flicks it uppishly towards deep mid-wicket. Bishnoi charges in then tries to run around; the ball lands wide of him and goes over the rope

slower ball outside off; the length was short and that allowed Ashutosh to delay his bat swing; he waits for the ball to arrive and slaps it extra cover. Not quite off the middle but enough for the ball to trickle into the rope..

Delhi Capitals win by 7 wickets. This is a record win for them - their highest successful chase in IPL history. Ashutosh jumps and pumps his fist in delight. Brijesh loses his grip on the yorker and sends out a high full toss; Ashutosh is taken aback but manages to swing it into the leg-side. The pair cross over but umpire signals a no-ball..
